def process_items(items):
    for item in items:
        # Correct: core work is isolated, loop handles high-level orchestration/errors
        try:
            process_single_item(item)
        except Exception:
            handle_item_failure(item)

def process_single_item(item):
    logging.info(f"Processing {item.id}")
    result = item.execute()
    db.save(result)

def handle_item_failure(item):
    logging.error(f"Failed {item.id}")
    db.rollback()
    recovery_queue.put(item)
